items.title: Don't expect changes from Apple anytime soon, even with new leadership
items.summary: We're already seeing claims on social media that John Ternus will change everything, quickly. Almost nothing changed in the first few years under Tim Cook, and even less will now. No single person has the power to change Apple overnight...

items.title: Tesla settles another wrongful death lawsuit, but not about Autopilot this time
items.summary: Tesla has settled a wrongful death lawsuit filed by the family of an 18-year-old passenger killed in a 116 mph crash in Fort Lauderdale. Plaintiffs alleged that a Tesla technician disabled a speed limiter without parental consent. The...

items.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
items.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

items.title: Isuzu launches its first electric pickup in the UK, but it's not cheap
items.summary: While Toyota is preparing to launch the Hilux BEV in the UK, another Japanese electric pickup is now on sale. The Isuzu D-MAX EV can tow over 7,700 lbs, wade through close to 24″ (600 mm) of water, and it even has a dedicated Rough Terrain...

items.title: Read Tim Cook's thank you letter to the Apple community
items.summary: Outgoing Apple CEO Tim Cook pens a heartfelt and humble letter of thanks to Apple users as he prepares to step down. Read it in full. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: How Tim Cook started at Apple in 1998, and how 15 years of being the CEO ends
items.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down from his position after 15 years, leaving a 28-year legacy at the company. Here's how Cook started at Apple, and how it's winding down. Tim Cook [left] with Steve Jobs [right] The departure of Cook to...

items.title: Arthur Levinson to become Apple's Lead Independent Director
items.summary: Arthur Levinson, who has spent more than fifteen years on Apple's board as the non-executive chairman, is set to take on a new role at the company. Arthur Levinson will become Apple's Lead Independent Director. As part of Apple's...

items.title: WEBINAR: Intrinsic Techniques in RF Power Amplifier Design
items.summary: Load-pull power amplifier (PA) design techniques determine the optimal impedances at the power transistor's extrinsic reference plane, which is the physically accessible boundary for measurement or simulation. This reference plane can be...

items.title: AI cloud company Vercel breached after employee grants AI tool unrestricted access to Google Workspace - hacker seeking $2 million for stolen data
items.summary: The breach exposed non-sensitive environment variables, and a threat actor operating under the ShinyHunters name has claimed responsibility.
